text: A linked list is a linear collection of nodes, each containing data and a pointer. O(1) insert/delete at known position, O(n) random access. Variants: singly-linked, doubly-linked, circular. Poor cache locality but dynamic sizing is trivial.

A linked list is a linear collection of nodes, each containing data and a pointer. O(1) insert/delete at known position, O(n) random access. Variants: singly-linked, doubly-linked, circular. Poor cache locality but dynamic sizing is trivial.
